idea-plugin.name: Pyrokai
idea-plugin.description:
Monokai's accent family, warm-shifted, expanded into a Flexoki-shaped tonal system. Eight hues × thirteen steps over a fifteen-step near-monochrome base — generated in OKLCH, gamut-mapped to sRGB.

Adds Pyrokai Dark and Pyrokai Light editor color schemes. Select under Settings → Editor → Color Scheme.

Full palette and matching themes for VS Code, Xcode, Ghostty, Slack, Obsidian, and more: patrickserrano.github.io/pyrokai
